en: Is it for me? Yeah, I thought you could use it, you know, when you start your band.
ko: 응, 네가 밴드를 시작할 때 쓸 수 있을 것 같아서.

en: Besides, I had some extra cash, you know. Some asshole paid me to take on this really great girl.
Is that right? Yeah, but I screwed up.
It's not every day you find a girl who'll flash someone to get you out of detention.
ko: 누군가를 구하기 위해 누군가에게 보여줄 여자애를 찾는 건 매일 있는 일이 아니야.

en: You can't just buy me a guitar every time you screw up, you know.
ko: 네가 망칠 때마다 나에게 기타를 사줄 수는 없어, 알지?

en: Yeah, I know. But then, you know, there's always drums and bass and maybe even one day a tambourine.
